body:
Good morning, Alexandria Friends! Happy Tuesday!

Yesterday was an odd one. I looked up yesterday and realized I kinda accidentally worked like 13.5 hours, which normally isn’t a big deal, I’ll just shorten other days, only I’m only working three days this week, so today and tomorrow will be really short I guess, lol.

Lessee, but then that followed that I couldn’t go to sleep last night until super late. I think I may have doubled up on my meds yesterday, oops!

I continued my sapphic song scene yesterday. Probably continuing the trend today.

I’m tired from lack of sleep, but maybe I can fit a power nap in there somewhere. I hope you all have a wonderful day and I’ll see you all around! 🖤
